changelog:
Version 2.1.0 - Professional Update

✅ AUTO-UPDATE:
• Automatic update checking on startup
• Manual update check via Help menu
• One-click installation
• Progress bar with percentage

✅ PROFESSIONAL UI:
• Clean flat buttons with hover effects
• Collapsible sections
• No emojis
• Wider toolbox (280px)
• Scrollable interface

✅ MAXIMIZED CANVAS:
• Canvas fills all remaining screen space
• Larger working area
• Better visibility

✅ DESCRIPTIVE LABELS:
• R+ Rotate CW, R- Rotate CCW
• + Size, - Size
• W+ Width, H+ Height
• C+ Curve

✅ ALL FEATURES:
• 4 Vehicles, 6 Roads, 5 Arrows
• Symbols, Labels, Compass
• PDF Export
